description_long: A wooden serving board holds three pieces of salmon nigiri sushi, each topped with a slice of fresh, marbled salmon and garnished with finely chopped green onions. The sushi rice is visible beneath the salmon, shaped into neat ovals. Scattered around the sushi are small orange fish roe and additional green onion pieces, adding color and texture. To the side of the board sits a small wooden bowl filled with dark soy sauce, and a dollop of green wasabi paste is placed on the board. The board itself has a rich, dark wood grain and a rectangular shape, providing a rustic and elegant presentation. The overall arrangement is visually appealing and typical of high-quality sushi served in urban eateries.
description: Three pieces of salmon nigiri sushi with green onion and roe garnish are arranged on a dark wooden board, accompanied by a bowl of soy sauce and wasabi.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three pieces of salmon nigiri, the soy sauce bowl on the left, and wasabi on the board.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the salmon slices and the arrangement of sushi pieces in a row.
description_view_2: Rear view with the soy sauce bowl now on the right, showing the back of the sushi and more garnish detail.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view with the soy sauce bowl and wasabi in the foreground, sushi pieces receding into the background.
